entry.title: DMS Administration
entry.content:
Hi All,

i am new to to SAP Basis, how to install & configure the Document Management System in windows server. if you share the links to follow its will be helpful.

Regards,

Rajesh.S

entry.title: Re: Cannot install Booster - SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Switch your subaccount to Singapore Microsoft Azure instead of Amazon AWS.
This will work.
We were facing the same issue while using Enable Integration suite in AWS subaccount.

Now we have service keys that we want to use.
Issue resolved.


Thanks,
Ayush Jha

entry.title: Re: Need multiple batches for source inspection
entry.content:
Greetings,

perhaps you can try having one PO item per batch. In this case you would have several items on your purchase order. Then you will have the option to create multiple inspection lots.

Best regards, M

entry.title: Re: Stay Informed About New SAP EarlyWatch Alerts You Are Interested In
entry.content:
Hello,
is there a way to get all the EWA reports created on Mondays automatically as PDF via E-Mail.
We have that currently with on-prem SolMan; but SAP ECS RISE systems are only hooked up to SAP's own flavour of SolMan, the FocusedRUN.
Regs
Ulf

entry.title: Re: SFC Card Core Plugin Extension Events Issue
entry.content:
Hi Manoel,

Thank you for your response.

I found out the solution. It is possible to trigger an event by publishing it through another extension provider.

For example, publishing PageChangeEvent from changeEquipmentStatusExtensionProvider. Since PageChangeEvent is supported by SFCCardExtension, it was captured by SFCCardExtensionProvider and it rendered new details on the SFC Card as per custom logic.

Thanks and Regards,

Sabahat Shaikh

entry.title: Re: New Stock Check Behavior in Over-the-Counter Sales: D...
entry.content: Dear requester, I believe this KBA would explain all your questions about this topic. 3516764 - Over-the-Counter Sales Inconsistent With the Error: Item XX: Insufficient Stock for the Product https://me.sap.com/notes/3516764 Best regards, Gavan SAP Technical Support

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Upgrade: A Comprehensive Security Framework
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Upgrade: A Comprehensive Security Framework

Upgrading to SAP S/4HANA is a critical milestone for businesses seeking enhanced performance, modern features, and future-proof systems. However, amid all the planning, testing, and execution, security often takes a backseat — a risk no organization can afford.

This guide walks you through a step-by-step approach to upgrading SAP S/4HANA with security as a priority. Let’s dive into the technical roadmap to ensure your system remains robust and secure throughout the transition.

Step 1: Pre-Upgrade Assessment

1.1 Analyze the Current Security Setup

Before starting the upgrade, analyze your current SAP ECC system for potential security gaps:

  • Authorization Review: Extract and evaluate user roles and profiles using tools like SUIM or AGR_1251. Identify and eliminate inactive users and outdated roles.
  • Custom Code Security: Use tools like SAP Code Inspector (SCI) or ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) to detect vulnerabilities in custom code. This ensures compatibility with S/4HANA’s simplified data model.
  • Security Notes Compliance: Apply the latest SAP Security Notes via transaction SNOTE, and address any unresolved gaps to ensure compliance.

1.2 System Readiness Check

Run the SAP Readiness Check to uncover technical and security prerequisites, such as unsupported add-ons, custom objects, or authorization gaps. Verify compatibility with the latest SAP HANA database version.

1.3 Establish a Security Baseline

Establish a robust security baseline:

  • Compare current system parameters (rz10/rz11) with SAP's recommended values for S/4HANA.
  • Document system configurations, user roles, and access permissions as a reference for post-upgrade validation.

Step 2: Preparing for the Upgrade

2.1 Secure the System Landscape

  • Create a Sandbox Environment: Clone your production system into a sandbox for upgrade testing. Mask sensitive data to prevent unauthorized access.
  • Strengthen Network Security: Validate and restrict connections between your systems using firewalls, encryption, and secure network communication protocols.

2.2 Hardening Security Settings

  • System Parameters: Adjust parameters like login/fails_to_user_lock and login/password_expiration_time to enforce stricter authentication rules.
  • User Authentication: Implement Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for admin users and integrate Single Sign-On (SSO) through a trusted Identity Provider (IdP).

2.3 Role and Authorization Adjustments

The SU25 transaction is your go-to tool for upgrading roles and authorization objects: 

  • Synchronize existing roles with new S/4HANA transactions.
  • Identify obsolete roles or transactions and clean them up.
  • Adjust roles to include updated or newly introduced authorization objects, especially for Fiori apps.
  • Transport the Customer Table

Note:

The activities mentioned above align with the specific steps of the SU25 transaction during the SAP S/4HANA upgrade. Each step plays a crucial role in ensuring that the authorization framework is seamlessly transitioned to the upgraded system. Below is the mapping of these activities to the SU25 process:

  • Step 2A: Automatic Comparison with SU22 Data
    Compares the existing customer-specific authorization values with SAP-delivered SU22 defaults to align with the updated S/4HANA standards.
  • Step 2B: Modification Comparison with SU22 Data
    Identifies and evaluates customer-specific modifications to SAP-delivered proposals, allowing informed decisions on retaining, adapting, or discarding these changes.
  • Step 2C: Roles to Be Checked
    Highlights roles impacted by changes in transactions or authorization objects, requiring adjustments to ensure compatibility with the new system.
  • Step 2D: Search for Obsolete Applications
    Locates and flags roles or transactions linked to deprecated functionality in S/4HANA, ensuring the removal or replacement of these obsolete elements.
  • Step 3: Transport the Customer Tables
    Facilitates the migration of updated authorization objects, roles, and changes to test and production systems via standard transport mechanisms.

Step 3: Upgrade Execution

3.1 Perform Data Migration Securely

  • Encrypt system backups during data transfer using SAP Data Volume Management (DVM). Validate data integrity with checksum tools.
  • Use the Simplification Item Check to ensure custom developments and data structures align with S/4HANA.

3.2 Secure Downtime Activities

  • Enable audit logging (SM19) to monitor all activities during the upgrade.
  • Restrict system access to critical users using an access whitelist.
  • Isolate the system by temporarily disabling non-critical integrations.

3.3 Execute the Upgrade

Use SAP Software Update Manager (SUM):

  • Select security settings, such as database encryption for the HANA database.
  • Monitor SUM_Security logs to address issues with roles or security objects during the upgrade process.

Step 4: Post-Upgrade Validation

4.1 Validate Authorizations

  • Use SU53 to test for missing authorizations and resolve issues promptly.
  • Assign roles for newly introduced S/4HANA features, such as Fiori apps.

4.2 Review System Security Settings

  • Cross-check system parameters against your baseline, especially for authentication and encryption.
  • Re-enable critical background jobs (SM37) while ensuring they comply with security standards.

4.3 Patch and Secure the System

  • Update the SAP kernel and apply the latest Security Notes.
  • Perform vulnerability checks using the SAP EarlyWatch Alert and address any security concerns.

Step 5: Post-Upgrade Monitoring

5.1 Enable Continuous Monitoring

  • Leverage tools like SAP Solution Manager or SAP Enterprise Threat Detection to monitor security events in real time.
  • Configure alerts for unauthorized access or suspicious activity.

5.2 Conduct Periodic Security Audits

  • Regularly review user roles and authorizations using SUIM.
  • Use SAP Configuration Validation to ensure your system adheres to established security standards.

5.3 Educate and Train Users

  • Train users on security best practices and changes introduced by SAP S/4HANA.
  • Provide detailed documentation for administrators to manage upgraded security features effectively.

    Security

entry.content:
How to create the Advance Credit Management for S4hana Public Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Logging Service (CLS) API access
entry.content:
Hi @akuller, 

Thanks for reaching out.

The default way to read data from Cloud Logging would be to use the OpenSearch Dashboard. If you are referring to extract data directly via API of OpenSearch - we realize the benefits of access to the backend. We are working on investigating an easier provisioning of read-only-user to allow such access, minimizing the scope of database mismanagement and securing credentials. 

We will publish the timeline ones we conclude the investigation. 

Best Regards, Cloud Logging Team

entry.title: problem with conversion to S/4HANA 2023 phase XPRAS_AIMMRG
entry.content:
Hello,
we have problem with conversion to S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 in phase MAIN_NEWBAS/XPRAS_AIMMRG. Problem is with BW activation object. Solution is perhaps in note "3316148 - Improve error handling for missing or inactive InfoObject 0REQPLAN during XPRAS_AIMMRG phase", but this note doesn´t exist for version SAP_BW 758. How to proceed?

List from log XPRASUPG.ELG:
A3 ERSO 778 End of after import methode "RS_ODPE_AFTER_IMPORT" ("Režim aktivace") - runtime: "00:00:00"

2EER7501XStart of the after-import method &3"RS_ELEM_AFTER_IMPORT" for object type(s) &1"ELEM" (&2" ")



4 ER9121 Element "6JW7K7L6N103QSISDYUIU693D" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

4 ER9121 Element "6JW7K7L6N103TSI7T77CJKB9Y" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

4 ER9121 Element "6JW7K7L6N103TSI8176HIJLGE" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

4 ER9121 Element "8ZZHFI9OHWPD3Z1AQFDRU7J7G" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

4 ER9121 Element "8ZZHFI9OHWPEU9RGB0KG4ZI6K" copied from 'modified' to 'active'

2EER9118 Error activating element "8ZZHFI9OHWPEU9RGJFEO47XVI"

A2AEBRAIN 299 System error in program "CL_RSRTS_METADATA_ODP/LCL_DTA" and form "POSTPROCESS_PROJECTION"



CAUSE

This internal error is a targeted termination since the program has an

incorrect status.



WHAT_TO_DO

Analyse the situation and inform SAP.


Thank you for quicik help.

entry.title: Re: SAP BYD OutboundDelivery by OData API missing Notes
entry.content:
Dear requester,

I believe this should be checked by Technical Support Team in a case, please report a case in the tenant you test for this issue along with your payload. 

Best regards,

Gavan

entry.title: Re: Last Used Date for a Procedure in SAP HANA
entry.content: Thanks, Vitaliy. I ran the suggested query for the schemas in question and I didn't get back any records. I guess they were never called. These schemas were not created by me, therefore I have no idea who developed them and how they were used.

entry.title: Re: From Application Logging to Cloud Logging: Service Innovation Guide
entry.content:
Hi @akuller_q, 

Thanks for reaching out. I did answer also in the other thread.

The default way to read data from Cloud Logging would be to use the OpenSearch Dashboard. To extract data directly via API of OpenSearch - we realize the benefits of access to the backend. We are working on investigating an easier provisioning of read-only-user to allow such access, minimizing the scope of database mismanagement and securing credentials.

Container metrics for Cloud Foundry applications is also in the pipeline (earlier than the API access). Using the recent contribution in Cloud Foundry community, we are currently in the load testing phase. We aim for Q1 release but it depends on the test results. 

We will publish the timeline for rollout ones we conclude the investigation. 

Best Regards, Cloud Logging Team

entry.content:
Hello @SIVARAM_L

To activate Advanced Credit Management (1QM) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition (Finance), an additional license is required.

Advanced credit management

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Guidance for the rehire scenario
entry.content:
Hello!

I have a requirement regarding the rehire scenario of an employee for a different job/position. When rehired, the employee should retain their learning history in the LMS. One of the alternatives we found was mapping the "PersonIDexternal" field in the SF-user connector. However, when executing the integration, the information in this field is being duplicated, generating the message "Record received for duplicate entity".

We would like to know what are the best practices recommended by SAP to address this rehire scenario, ensuring that the employee's information is neither lost nor duplicated or lost.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services and SAP ALM for business...
entry.content:
Hello,

You need to set up a reverse proxy in the IAS tenant assigned to SAP Cloud ALM that forwards to the Corporate IDP.

More detailed information is in Help SAP : https://wiki.one.int.sap/wiki/display/AGILE/Configuring+Corporate+IdPs

Regards,

Paul

entry.title: Re: Need multiple batches for source inspection
entry.content: Thank you for your suggestion. At the time of PO creation, we have no idea how many batches the supplier will deliver us because it is completely dependent on stock availability.

entry.title: Re: How to reset the password of a Technical User?
entry.content:
Hi Ronan,

In case the Technical User is used to authenticate between SAP Commerce and SAP CPI, this updated password needs to be adapted in CPI as well, right? If yes, any idea on how to do so in CPI?

Additionally, is it possible to share some URLs or screenshots on how IAM looks like? 

Thanks,
Rupan

entry.title: Re: PaPM On Premise - Dual Control with Simulation Proces...
entry.content:
Hi Riccardo,

Yes, it is expected for A0002 not to be executed if the previous activity is not yet completed even if the process is set to Simulation. You can check for more information via this link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_PROFITABILITY_PERFORMANCE_MANAGEMENT/56471df1959f4cfd9e3bf7a6d2d5be42/bf4174d6b00c493cb5bfaa1ac797c982.html?locale=en-US.

Hope this helps!

Thanks and best regards,
Kevin

entry.title: validation for stage as mandatory in marketing documents but stage is not available in any table.
entry.content: In marketing documents we have project and related stages. We want to make stage as mandatory field through validation since this linkage has effect in project budgets, but we are not able to find the stage field in any tables of marketing documents such as RDR1 to RDR27. kindly share if there is any solution

entry.title: EU Access Option Confirmation
entry.content:
With reference to: EU Access Only availability? - SAP Community.

and the TVRF question: 

If the customer has compliance, legal or country-specific support regulations that prevent third-party or non-EU companies from supporting the customer's solution, has that been validated for support within RISE?  Update the comment (if applicable)

Can you please confirm that EU Access Option can be provided for the following data center:

  • Microsoft Azure Norway East

Thank you.

RISE with SAP

entry.title: Re: SM13 update failed while creating a PO in ECC 6
entry.content: I won't click the images one by one to see all of them. Please embed the screenshots in your question. You may also attach the short dump as text file or zip file. You can find the concerned table name, you may look at the table to see if the line already exists before running the code, you may or may not debug the update task if the update task can be restarted, etc.

entry.title: How to change Tax code filed as mandatory filed at Purchase Contract level
entry.content:
How to change Tax code filed as mandatory filed at Purchase Contract level


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change Tax code filed as mandatory filed at Pu...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

https://me.sap.com/notes/3468887/E

App Extensibility: Manage Purchase Contracts

You can use the below BADI :Change of Field Control for Purchase Contract Header and Item (MM_PUR_S4_CTR_MODIFY_FLDCTRL) 

 

Thanks and Regards

SAP SUPPORT

entry.title: Re: SM13 update failed while creating a PO in ECC 6
entry.content:
Start debug and, in the menu, activate the 'update debugging'

  • Debug asynchronous Update Task

You should also post the debug in a text format.

Seems you activated the sample/demo implementation of BAdi ME_GUI_PO_CUST, why?

entry.title: Re: Can't open SAP Attachment link via FIORI inbox
entry.content: You should first look for OSS notes similar to 2400273 'F0545: Access to attachments' for this application for your system version.

entry.title: Re: Active/Active Read enabled option
entry.content: which i referred the SAP note, 2685661 - Licensing required for HANA System Replication in this they clearly mentioned, required additional license for pure read access,

entry.title: Re: From Application Logging to Cloud Logging: Service Innovation Guide
entry.content:
Hi @Hariharan-Gandhi ,

Yes, we have built our own views and integrated them. Nevertheless, the customer wants a deeper integration.

This are very good news regarding CF. Is there a kind of beta programm or something similar?

entry.title: Re: SM13 update failed while creating a PO in ECC 6
entry.content: Best guess with limited information is a BADI implementation 'ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST' that has gone awry.

entry.title: Re: Dump CONVT_NO_NUMBER during edition smartform
entry.content: With a S-ID, look first for OSS notes

entry.title: Re: Active/Active Read enabled option
entry.content: which i referred the SAP note, 2685661 - Licensing required for HANA System Replication in this they clearly mentioned, required additional license for pure read access, This differs significantly from our previous experience with Oracle Database, where we were able to directly log into the secondary database without such constraints. Given the increasing trend of businesses migrating to HANA in the coming years, it is crucial to have the flexibility to access secondary systems as needed. At present, it appears that there is no direct option for logging into the secondary HANA system, which is quite different from how we managed similar scenarios with Oracle. I believe this could be a limitation or bug that needs attention, as it is hindering operational flexibility. I have been working on this issue for over a month now and, unfortunately, have not received a definitive solution from SAP. As a result, I find myself leaning towards Oracle, which appears to offer a more user-friendly solution in this context. I wanted to bring this matter to your attention, as it seems to be a significant concern for organizations looking to adopt HANA for their future enterprise solutions.

entry.title: Forward propagation on job info via CPI
entry.content:
Hello Guys,
Currently we see an issue when job info gets updated by CPI and on a retro date meaning not the top of the stack record, the changes are not forward propagated to the top of the stack record on job info. 

Just wanted to know if there is a method to achieve forward propagation in job info when changes are done via CPI .

Thanks in advance ..

entry.title: Re: New Live Session: Starting with AI in SAP Customer Experience Solutions
entry.content: Thanks Fernando! There is so much AI potential already embedded in CX - can't wait to hear of the business value created at the first reference customers ...

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA for Utilities 2023 Market Process Management end maintenance conflict with 2040 commitme
entry.content:
A few key questions here:

Is the 2040 support commitment and the scope of what that covers listed in any of your written license agreements?
For the product discontinuation you refer to, what has SAP said is the replacement?
For any product replacements, do you have successor or replacement product language in your agreements (in this case it may not be necessary)?

I'm also puzzled by the questions as the document that was posted says that SAP will provide a replacement for the item that is being discontinued and to contact them.

entry.title: Re: Fetch data in ABAP, using SDA connection
entry.content: unfortunately one of my customers wants to write to a MS SQL Database table which resides in Azure. In the video Arne Harren said (minute ~39) that write is a planned feature 😞

entry.title: Re: Setting up the Target Population for Delegator in Del...
entry.content:
I have the same question and have reached out SAP support. I've been directed to the Partner community 🙂

Anyone would know the answer?

What I assume: Create a permission group using a filter that would identify all people managers in the organization. Assign that group as granted and (potentially) target population.

However, if this is the case, in some customer cases, it's not easy to filter people managers in a group definition as the data structure might not allow it.

entry.title: Re: Modeling an advanced Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: thanks for the feedback!

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hi @hariprasadgud ,

Thank you for your reply on my earlier question on System Admin access. I suppose it is what it is for now. I raised an influence request for the same https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/335455/?section=sectionVotes.

But to continue on this topic, RBP, would it be possible to split permissions between creating and updating a bundle and the actual transport of a bundle? Our idea on the process is that we want it to be possible for all Super Admins to work on bundles, but only 1 person to actually be charge of the transport to another instances. The idea behind it is to keep in control of what is transported and in what shape.

I have tried different combinations of settings but so far, I did not manage to separate the permission to transport from the permission to add to a bundle. Should it be possible yet?

Looking forward to your reply,
Roos🌹

entry.title: Re: EWM inbound delivery not getting created against purc...
entry.content: Hi Rashid ji , I didn't fully understand the input shared, DOG is a outbound del gds Mvt and I have issue in inbound delivery process for a purchase order where the goods are supplied by customer. here do we have and outbound doc type.?

entry.title: Re: Need multiple batches for source inspection
entry.content:
Greetings,

I think if you could upon onsite inspection (assuming that at this time the number of batches is know) split the PO item into several pieces you would be able to achieve the required functionality.

Other option is to manually create inspection lots in QA01. This option allows you create as many inspection lots as you want.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Data Services encountered an error while reading real...
entry.content: Thank you for the prompt. I have configured the DS real-time task with an XML file. When this real-time task runs, it will start a Web Services task. My next question is how to pass SLT messages to the Web Services task

entry.title: Message error /SPE/MAN 012 in COGI
entry.content:
Hi experts.

We have a scenario where we are using EWM decentralized integrated with S4 / PP.

When we post an order confirmation generating movement 101 in PP, sometimes we get this error /SPE/MAN 012 in COGI.
After we process this error, we are getting duplicated deliveries in EWM.

Anyone knows how to prevent this message to occur? Or the root cause?

Thanks in advance.

Caio.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA create custom field and logic, transporting and delete process.
entry.content: very helpful!

entry.title: Application ME41 cannot be opened in S/4 Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP-Support, 

 

I'm using the application Assign and Process Purchase Requisition in the system. It is possible to mark an item as request for quotation. However, if you go to the request for quotation app and try to execute this functionality you get the message ("You are not authorized to use ME41")

I searched for the ME41 in the Fiori App library and checked for the roles (e.g. BR_Purchaser) and I'm assigned to this role.  

 

Could you please check why I get this message?

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Application ME41 cannot be opened in S/4 Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

I hope you must be having the role SAP_BCR_MM_RFQ_PROCESS_PC is included, which is part of SAP_BR_PURCHASER. If incase mentioned RFQ role is not visible for you at all please check if one of the following scope items (1XF, 1A0, 1L2) is active in your system, because you can run the RFQ processing with one of these scope items only.

Also the recommended way in the cloud for creating an RFQ with a reference to a Purchase Requisitions is via 'Manage Purchase Requisitions' app, as in cloud for RFQ process GUI apps are not supported

 

Best Regards

SAP SUPPORT

entry.title: Re: Integrating Onboarding and Learning For New Hires Before Day-1
entry.content: We have tried to follow these steps, but the user fields like name and user ID remain blank. The users are not in the user file, so how can the integration centre pick them up?

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hello @hariprasadgud ,

I have a question about promoting a bundle. I know it is expected behavior that promoting a bundle can only be done when the status of the transport bundle is Import Completed.

But there are scenarios where we would still want to promote the bundle, even with status Import Completed with Errors. We have an example where the ConfigUIMeta errorred on transport (why is unclear because all dependencies are transported along with it) so we had to update it manually. But the rest of the import was still useful to promote to other instances. 

Any chance it will be possible in the future that also import bundles with error status allow to promote, maybe with an extra confirmation step?

Thanks,
Roos🌹

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory Process in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi @PrasannaKumarReddyGurijala,

During count activity by rf in a bin that has a lot of materials, is possible to have/confirm a partial count or is necessary to count all lines of that material document is made by?

Thank

Giulia

entry.title: Re: Issues in activating EWM- BW Datasource (0WM_WO)
entry.content: Please share the document related link

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hi @RoosReijers , We did limit to allowing promote only to bundle which is imported completely to make sure only bundles which are tested completely are moved to production... But I do get your concern will evaluate and see if we can bring in the support.

Thanks,

Hari

entry.title: Re: Free trials and downloads not available
entry.content: Hi Abo, I apologise for the delay. I am able to download Part One. Is the issue resolved? Thanks and best wishes Julie.

entry.title: Re: COPA Derivation for Partner functions cannot working
entry.content:
Hi Qiao,

I understand that you are encountering issues in populating the COPA Document. However, this needs to be further check. May I request to kindly raise an OSS incident for this one. Kindly see this link https://me.sap.com/notes/1339209 and follow the steps provided in creating an OSS incident.

Thank you for your understanding!

Best regards,
Kevin

entry.title: custom splash screen for mdk branded client
entry.content:
Hello experts,

i am having some issues in customizing the spash screen in my branded mdk app. I am using mobile cloud build.

i uploaded a MDK Project ZIP File in the mobile build job basic information section (for multi user support) but have no idea how to configure the splash screen.

i was looking at the Branding Your Customized App - SAP Mobile Services Documentation documentation and it says to put a splash_screen.xml in drawable-nodpi folder. Where is that folder's location. I dont have that in the project zip. Should i add it manualy? if so where? 

This is my mdkproject folder.

 

Do you have an example on how this is done?

Thank you for your support.

Best Regards, RaulM

entry.title: Re: How to install cx_integrations recipe in SAP Commerce Cloud 2105?
entry.content: Thanks mansurarisoy, that was very helpful.

entry.title: Excise Invoice Goods Receipt Procedure India with EWM
entry.content:
Referring to help.sap document related to External Procurement (Imports) in country India.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/240fcdcc71c640ea9aa9691500b34889/889ad7531a4d414de10000000a174cb4.html

Legal requirement to capture excise invoices for Bills of Entry.  Procedure refers only to Entering of Goods Receipt in MM via Migo where pop-up will appear at GR posting to capture excise invoice number for the Bill of Entry. 

Request for information how this procedure needs to be executed with the use of SAP EWM when GR is posted in SAP EWM and communicated back to ERP.

entry.title: Re: Custom Attribute description in Signavio
entry.content:
Hello,

To assist you further, we kindly ask you to open an SAP for Me ticket. Please log in using your S-user ID and password.

If you’re unsure about your S-user ID or encounter any issues, feel free to reach out to us at signavio_success@sap.com. We’ll be happy to help.

Best regards,
Veronika

entry.title: Re: External documents are opening in a new tab instead o...
entry.content: @RanjaniR, could it be related to the scenario described in the KBA 3424466?

entry.title: Re: Migrating from CR9 nowadays
entry.content:
Have a look at the Parameter Test app:

Related Documents

Crystal Reports for Visual Studio Licensing

Getting started and moving ahead with Crystal Reports .NET applications

See this Blog for instructions upgrading your existing project to the latest SP

See this blog on how to use CR 2020 Export to XLXS page formats:

How to use the new CR 2020 export to Microsoft Excel(XLXS) in Visual Studio .NET code (new)

how-to-parameters-in-crystal-reports-for-visual-studio-net

Printing Crystal Reports in .NET

SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio Installation Guide ( SP 21 and above)

When Stored Procedures are used you MUST set the parameter values first and then set the DB log on info so CR can pass the Parameter values to the SP before logging on.

See if that resolves the issue.

entry.title: Re: Content 'Not mobile accessible' for non-mobiles (Tabl...
entry.content: @EmilyNS, not completely related to the question, but the Supported Mobile Browsers for SAP SuccessFactors and Mobile Application Support for SAP SuccessFactors are a good start to verify what would have support.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model | Eighth Customer Roundtable
entry.content:
It's a long time since we had the last SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Customer Roundtable. And a lot of things happened since the last time. In June 2024 we released new major versions, version 8 for CAP Node.js stack and version 3 for the Java stack. Altogether we published more than 30 (!) Open Source components around the eco-system of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. Information on cap-js-contributions you can find here and here, information on cap-java contributions are also available. 

In June, we had a phantastic re>≡CAP 2024 conference with hundreds of active visitors and participants, onsite and dialed in remotely. We touched topics like full stack BTP applications, CAP + Type Script, Performance, Embedded Analytics, Native OData Adapter, and even the application of GenAI technologies. Thus, the success story of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model continues.

But, more important than technology innovations are the users and customers of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. The more it is used, the more it is adopted in productive applications the more mature it becomes and the more it can ensured that technology and features met real life needs and the more we can increase quality and reliability. 

Thus the eighth SAP Cloud Application Programming Model is dedicated to your CAP experiences, requiremens and - also - your success stories of productive appliciations of the CAP framework. 

Consequently the agenda this time looks like the following:

  1. Intro with some reCAP Recordings and an outlook on Code Connect 2025
  2. Update from new CAP features and Capire documentation
  3. Customer Success Stories
  4. Q&A

 

Meeting Information


When: Wednesday, December 11th, 2024, 11 AM EST | 5 PM CET

Where: Teams Meeting

Meeting Request Download: Link   

Who:  

    • All interested partners and stakeholders are invited to join: developers, enterprise architects, technical consultants…
    • The SAP Cloud Application Programming Model team: among others @TheSebastian  & me (as hosts), @Daniel7  (Chief Product Owner), @lilienthal (Head), and further team members, e.g. Product Owners and Architects
    • Anyone interested in learning about the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model and exchange your ideas and feedback with other users and the product team


Looking forward to seeing you there!
Check also out the new Events page in our documentation and our Community page for updates on upcoming events.

entry.title: Re: Valuation type of material ignored during STO (ITSAP-...
entry.content:
Hello there,

This blog describes the option that we have using new routine and customer logic in BADI "PRCG_DOC_ITEM_COND_AMOUNT". Here we can influence the condition price which is used in the PO and it works well. Unfortunatelly, it cannot be used for our case - we need to find the material price based on the plant and valuation type. Material number and plant are available in BADI as import parameter, but we do not have an information about valuation type selected in the PO item. When we are in the process of PO creation, we are not able to read this information from database. 
Do we have any other option?

entry.title: Get to know the RISE with SAP advanced working capital management package
entry.content:
In today's business landscape — shaped by increased financial volatility, complexity, and global disruptions — keeping borrowing costs under control, strengthening supplier relationships, and optimizing financial outcomes are strategic objectives for any Finance department at enterprises. They are crucial for financial health, underpin business transformation, and enable investment in future growth, as well as in the economic future.

The newly released RISE with SAP advanced working capital management package helps you meet these objectives. Designed for RISE with SAP, it provides deep insights into your financial position, and robust planning tools to build a long-term liquidity strategy. By improving decision-making, reducing risk and achieving liquidity optimisation, through an effective working capital management strategy, this package helps you to meet your financial objectives while strengthening supplier relationships.

 

 

Differentiator #1

Provides you with full visibility into the cash flow information needed to make decisions, advanced liquidity forecasting tools and the suite of working capital capabilities to optimize liquidity, unlike any other solution on the market.

Differentiator #2

SAP's working capital solution is a complementary part of your ERP Finance experience. The package delivers a complete end-to-end treasury and working capital management solution, integrated with your core financial and supply chain processes.

Differentiator #3

Helps to finance your RISE transformation via dynamic discounts and unlocking of working capital through Supply Chain Finance early payment programs.

 

Why does Working Capital matter?

Working capital is the difference between a company’s current assets and its current liabilities on its balance sheet. It reflects the liquid resources available to a business to run its day-to-day operations, and it is a market indicator of a company’s short-term financial health.

 

Your insights are only as good as the actions you can take with them.

Optimising your working capital requires flexibility amid changing market and internal conditions, and data-driven management is essential for successful execution. By leveraging data, you can enhance performance and profitability, gain objective insights, and uncover emerging opportunities. Embracing a data-driven approach provides a competitive edge for developing smarter strategies and achieving improved outcomes.

The RISE with SAP advanced working capital management package equips you with the essential SAP planning, analytics, and execution tools to leverage your financial business data and effectively put your working capital management strategies into practice. It provides you with access to SAP Cash Management, Taulia Cash Flow Acceleration (Dynamic Discounting, Virtual Cards, Sustainable Supplier Finance), and equips you with the necessary SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning users.

Effective Liquidity Management, Predictive Planning, and Cash Conversion Cycle Optimization. The package includes SAP Cash Management, SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning, and Taulia Cash Flow Acceleration

 

E2E Planning, Analytics, and Working Capital Execution

By leveraging each solution in conjunction with the other, the package enables the E2E lifecycle of both short-term cash flow management along with longer term strategic liquidity planning, ensuring effective tactical and strategic working capital management execution.

The solutions enable the E2E planning, analytics, and execution lifecycle of Treasury and Working Capital Management

Cash Management takes care of your cash flow forecasting. With SAP Cash Management our customers track, control, and manage their cash. Real-time data visibility of global cash positions, and monitoring of currency, company, bank, and account enable data-driven decision making. By determining an accurate cash position the business can determine quickly it’s deficit or excess of cash. This is the source enabler for effective working capital management execution via receivables financing or supplier early payment programs.

SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning facilitates the long-term liquidity planning. Along with the Taulia Scenario Planner, a long-term working capital management strategy can be developed and imported to observe its effect on cash flow over time. Identifying long-term cash surplus or deficits is the opportunity to introduce supplier early payment discount offers, pushing out of supplier terms, offering bank funded early payment programs or selling receivables to shore up expected liquidity needs.

Taulia Cash Flow Acceleration executes the working capital strategy. With Dynamic Discounting, our customers optimise their operational expenses by offering early payments to suppliers in exchange for discounts. Suppliers can choose which invoices to accelerate and gain liquidity. The earlier the payment, the greater the discount, creating a win-win situation that enhances supplier relationships. By leveraging the Sustainable Supplier Finance feature, customers reward suppliers who meet ESG targets, thus offering financial incentives for ethical practices. With Virtual Cards, it’s possible to maintain sufficient liquidity by gaining an extra 30 days of payment terms, reducing the cost of short-term borrowing. Virtual card numbers (VCNs) are issued digitally to suppliers and offer a fast, safe, and straightforward way to pay, seamlessly integrated with the ERP system. This delivers an overall reduction in supplier payment information management costs, along with operational efficiencies in payment delivery.

 

Get in touch with our dedicated Sales Team

As a RISE with SAP customer, you can leverage this package to plan and analyse your cash flow and long-term liquidity, you can build and execute your working capital strategy by reducing your operational expenses and optimising your Free Cash Flow. Please contact our dedicated Sales Team: SAP_Taulia_sales@sap.com.

To learn more about each component of the RISE with SAP advanced working capital management package, please explore SAP Cash Management, SAP Analytics Cloud for Planning, SAP Cash Flow Acceleration (SAP Note, SAP Working Capital solutions), and take advantage of the FREE SAP Learning course Discovering Taulia for Working Capital Management in SAP S/4HANA.

Read the What is working capital? article.

entry.title: Re: SAC Master data entry check the existing record
entry.content:
@SAC_Developer 

May be you can try using indexof() to see if current employee already exists. Index of can check if member exists and returns -1 if does not.

Check syntax and example below.

https://www.w3schools.com/jsref/jsref_indexof.asp

Something like below

var tot_cnt = PlanningModel_1.getMembers("EMP_Details");
	
		  var currentEmp = INP_EMP_Id.getValue();
		  		  
		  if(tot_cnt.indexOf(currentEmp) === -1 && currentEmp)

{
// Put your code here for adding the member
}

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Character are doubled when exporting Report to PDF wi...
entry.content: Likely an issue with how the TTF is designed, they do have to follow the rules when creating a TTF font. I've see this happen before, I've been supporting CR for 25+ years. Registrry Keys are designed to resolve issues for Windows to deal with Font Glyphs, the embedded internals of how Windows deals with Fonts. Grreat you found the key that resolves the issue...

entry.title: Post credit memo to transferred fixed asset
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

We have the following case: 

Asset under construction A:

-acquisition: 200 000€, posting date 30.09.2024, value date 30.09.2024

-transfert to fixed asset B: 200 000€, posting date 01.10.2024, value date 01.10.2024

Fixed asset B: 

-acquisition from transfer of AuC A: 200 000€, posting date 01.10.2024, value date 01.10.2024

Depreciation key is LINE.

Now we are trying to post a 100€ credit memo to Fixed asset B, on 02.10.2024. 

But the system gives error "Acquisition value will become negative". 

It seems that we can only post a Credit Memo from following month, 01.11.2024. 

Could you please explain the reason for this behavior?

I do not find a clear explanation, neither in the properties of depreciation key, nor in the documentation. 

Thank you,

Kind regards

Anaïs

entry.title: Re: EWM inbound delivery not getting created against purc...
entry.content: It is an example you need to follow it check same for inbound delivery

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model | Eight Customer Roundtable
entry.content:
@michael_hellenschmidt 

Date is 11.03.2024?

Also "Meeting Request Download" is empty

entry.title: How to set up posting date for Material Inventory Migration object
entry.content:
Dear SAP support,

 

We have maintained Migration Key Date in the app Define Settings for Legacy Data Transfer but this Date is not considered in the migrations of Inventory. The system uses current date as a posting date. Could you please check? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set up posting date for Material Inventory Mig...
entry.content:
Thank you for reaching out and for your patience as we address your concern.

 

The system is currently using the current date as the posting date because the warehouse number has been assigned to the plant or storage location before migrating the inventory balances.

According to our help documentation which can be found here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/476cf31fd1e046a0889bc3ef8da325c3.html?version=2408.VAL, the inventory balances should be migrated before assigning the warehouse number to ensure the correct posting date is used.

To resolve this, we recommend following the migration steps outlined in the help document.

 

If you have any further questions or need additional assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me.

entry.title: Re: External Learning Request - Notification for confirma...
entry.content: @lmclfrancisco, as it stands, there wouldn't exist, at this moment, this option. When the Template ID to Trigger to Receiver Map is checked, the External Learning Request related notifications are sent when an approval/verification is required. An enhancement request (KBA 2090228) could be created for it, where the Learning Product Management team can further review and assess the requested functionality to be considered in a future release.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports SP 33 Runtime ASP.NET Integrated secu...
entry.content:
Always use the latest SP for CR for VS, currently it's SP 36, this is too use all of the latest Security updates and OS updates, you can get it from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

See this post for possible fix:

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/50993108/impersonation-in-crystal-reports

Check your Web.config file and look for more than one, it could be IIS is using one other than the one specified in your app folder.

You also must use Sessions and PostBack to keep the report in focus, see this KBA:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/1985571

And have a look at this Blog I wrote when upgrading to current versions of CR for VS:

Upgrading a Visual Studio 2008->2022 .NET project with the latest CR .NET SDK packages

entry.title: Re: SF Recruiting Job Requisition Details Print Preview
entry.content:
Hello
Here you will find proposed solution

3542130 - 2H2024 - Error when Selecting Print Preview button on Job Requisition Details Page - Recruiting Management

entry.title: Re: SF Recruiting Job Requisition Details Print Preview
Top 10 SAP Cloud ALM News November 2024
entry.content:
SAP Cloud ALM continues to evolve with new features that enhance project management, monitoring, and traceability. Here are the top 10 highlights from the latest November 2024 update:

1. Filter by Release in the Overview App

Now, you can filter by Release in the Overview app. This filter updates data for the Tasks, Requirements, Features, and Defect Distribution cards, making it easier to manage and view relevant information.

 

2. Assign One Document to Multiple Entities

You can now assign the same document multiple times to different entities within a solution process during a project’s scope. This flexibility helps ensure that critical documents are appropriately referenced across the solution process flow.

3. New Event Type in Integration & Exception Monitoring

Introducing a new event type called Issues Detected. This feature allows you to configure events based on status group, status, direction, or other available filter parameters for a message category. It's designed to enhance your monitoring capabilities for detecting and managing issues efficiently.

 

 

4. New Defects Column in Process Hierarchy Assignment App

The Process Hierarchy Assignment app now includes a new Defects column, giving you a clearer view of defects related to various process elements.

5. Related Test Plans to a Defect

With the new Test Plan filter in the Defect Reporting app, all tabs are filtered accordingly, and the Defect Distribution tab now offers a By Test Plan selection for defects. This enhancement enables more precise defect tracking and analysis.

 

6. Improved Availability Status in Synthetic User Monitoring:

Availability status for failed executions due to monitoring issues will no longer be rated. These executions are displayed with an Availability Not Rated status in blue, helping you distinguish between genuine availability issues and monitoring-related failures.

 

7. Central List of Solution Activities

A new central list is available, displaying all solution activities for easy maintenance, creation, and deletion. This list supports better management and oversight of solution activities with enhanced filtering and search features.

8. Assign Requirements, User Stories, or Project Tasks to Multiple Solution Processes:

You can now assign the same requirement, user story, or project task to multiple solution processes, offering greater flexibility and alignment with how documents are handled.

9. Assign Transport Nodes to Systems

This feature allows you to assign transport nodes to systems within a system group, simplifying the management of transport configurations.

10. Assign Multiple Solution Processes to Certain Task Types

Requirements, defects, user stories, and project tasks can now be assigned to multiple solution processes, allowing for more nuanced and flexible task management across different solution scenarios.

 

These top 10 features in the November 2024 SAP Cloud ALM update are designed to streamline operations, improve management efficiency, and enhance user experience. For more detailed information, visit the SAP Help Portal.

Stay tuned for more exciting updates as SAP continues to innovate and improve the #Cloud ALM experience!

entry.title: Why isn't the "enhancement" I added working?
entry.content:
Hi Master,

 I want to add a warning behind the FB08 screen. As you can see in the images below, I wrote the ENHANCEMENT code under the END-ENHANCEMENT-POINT, but I can't see it in debug mode. What could be the reason for this?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Issue with focus, scroll after SAPUI5 upgrade
entry.content: The issue should be fixed by now thanks to the change https://github.com/SAP/openui5/commit/6589001a928be6de9b00cfff69a92223c31fc044 which is available from UI5 1.127 so far. Make sure to upgrade to one of the maintained SAPUI5 versions that is 1.127 or higher.

entry.title: Re: Why isn't the "enhancement" I added working?
entry.content: Is the parent "standard" ENHANCEMENT active? If not then there is your answer.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model | Eighth Customer Roundtable
entry.content: @Marian_Zeis try again please. I added the link. Best regards

entry.title: LSMW issue with assigning info type to an object type in CR02
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

For PP work center Qualification control,  there is an integration between PP work center and HR work center (Object type A) to which qualifications are assigned. (See ill. 1: CR02-HRMS-Qualification)

In LSMW batch input recording,  always encounter the issue that the ticking of the check box is not recorded which results in the failure when executing the LSMW. 

Shown below, after specifying the Object type, need to tick the check box. But the action can not be captured in recording.

Please kindly advise if you have any experience on this.

Sally

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Application Programming Model | Eighth Customer Roundtable
entry.content: @michael_hellenschmidt worked, thanks!

entry.title: Re: What are the Business Functions that should be activated with IS_UTIL_WASTE ?
entry.content:
Hello Juan,

The best entry point is the SAP Help Portal for Utilities.
Here you will find also a point Business Functions containing a description of all business functions available for Utilities. Business function ISU_UTIL_WASTE is described here as well.

Please consider also the following documentation about different types of business functions.
Even though it is described for SAP ERP, same is valid in S/4HANA.
Remark: Some of them are NOT reversible once they were activated!

In the SAP Help Portal for Utilities you will also find the User Assistance for Utilities.
And especially for SAP S/4HANA for Waste and Recycling.

Best regards,
Katrin
SAP Support

entry.title: sapui5 vscode problem when preview - component not found
entry.content:
Hello,

Maybe I can get some help...

in my vscode workspace I have two separate apps.

app1 zkdklsel is type component

app2 zkdtagesdok is type application

that is how app2 wants to use app1:

"resourceRoots": {
"zkdklsel": "./zkdklsel/webapp"
},
"componentUsages": {
"klientSelect": {
"name": "zkdklsel",
"settings": {},
"componentData": {
"singleSelect": false,
"dokVfTyp": "TDV2"
}
}
},

but i get an error on preview:

failed to load 'zkdklsel/Component.js' from ../zkdklsel/webapp/Component.js: script load error

i have tried and searched for so long and in many different ways, but i doesn't work.

And it should also work when deployed - so maybe i only have to set something in my ui5.yaml ?

thanks for your help

Helmut

entry.title: Enable Now as ChatBot resource
entry.content:
Hello,

we would like to use Enable Now as source for our company intern chatbot. 

The idea would be that the chatbot can read the information in our workarea and uses it as base for the answers.

In addition, we don't just want to read out the information and pass it to the chatbot for use, but also include new information in Enable Now.

Does anyone have any ideas on how we could make the information from Enable Now available to the chatbot?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Base64 String Issues When Posting Attachments via ODa...
entry.content:
Hello Benjamin,

First of all, you have to find out on which side you have an issue. I'd start from checking CPI. Could you please log your message as the first and last steps in your iflow?
Just for tests, you can use Persist step or Write one (Persistence --> Data Store Operations --> Write).
Then download your payloads to your computer and open them in Notepad++, for example.
Edit them to extract PDF files and then decode (Plugins --> MIME Tools --> Base64 Decode) and save them.
Try to open those two files. Are they proper PDF files?
In this way you will know if you receive a proper file from your sender and if it's corrupted or not on CPI.
If not then the issue is on the receiver side.

BR,

Andrzej

entry.title: EWM Quality Inspection Lot is not showing the serial number
entry.content:
Hi Gurus

I am facing below issues in Quality Inspection lot for EWM scenario.

  1. Quality Inspection lot is created but serial number is not shown when we click Serial number icon inside Quality Inspection lot.
  2. Quality inspection lot is created but serial number is not tallying with the number of serial number of the inspection lot.For example : Inspection lot qty is 6 but serial number shown is only.

Seeking your inputs on this.

System Environment : S4 HANA - Embedded EWM 

Regards 

Vignesh

entry.title: Calling Secured iFlow from SAPUI5
entry.content: Can somebody explain how can I call the Integration Flow SECURED Endpoint from SAP UI5? To call it in Postman, I first fetch the acess_token with token endpoint then request the json resource with that token. How do I implement it with SAP UI5, so the token of the currently logged in users is user? Also how make the SAP UI5 get the token when user logins? I implemented this scenario 100 time in Angluar and React with custom backend scenarios. There is literally 0 documentation on how to do this in the SAP environment.

entry.title: Service broker error: when trying to create an ABAP instance in BTP trial account
Re: Need help Updating PDF content through CPI
entry.content:
I am now able to update the document in Ariba but the PDF is not opening there . It seems the decoded PDF is breaking in CPI.

Step- 1 : Getting base64 encoded PDF

Step-2: Decoding via standard Decoder

Step-3: Forming Request Body with the following Groovy before PUT call

def Message processData(Message message) {
def body = message.getBody(String);
body = body.replaceAll(" ", " ");
def multipartBody = """--cpi Content-Disposition: form-data; name="file"; filename="DOC_T_V3.pdf" Content-Type: application/pdf """ + body + """ --cpi--""";
message.setBody(multipartBody);
return message;
}

Please suggest what is missing here.

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content: Can anyone let me know how we can retrieve the Client ID and Secret from ANAF side. i guess while registration this information was not set to us so we are not aware how to retreive these Client ID and secret

entry.title: Re: Why isn't the "enhancement" I added working?
entry.content:
@Tomas_Buryanekthank you so much for your answer .but
I am just learning about the subject of Enhancement. What is "Standard Enhancement"? Which one is it? 

 

thanks

entry.title: Re: master data template configuration node in SAP ISU issue
entry.content:
Hello,

is this system connected to a CRM system?
Normally, this would be the attribute from the CRM product which is mapped over the MDT to the operand (in this case from type FACTOR). 
Have you checked the CRM product?

Best regards,
Katrin
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to convert string to integer in ABAP.
entry.content: INCORRECT
